name: AU Zenith+ Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Annual fee waived on spending ₹8,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 3 Reward Points per ₹100 spent on all purchases
10X Reward Points (30 RP per ₹100) on AU travel portal bookings
5X Reward Points (15 RP per ₹100) on all international transactions

cappedCategories.description: 10X rewards on travel portal capped at 15,000 bonus RP per month

welcomeBenefits.description: 10,000 bonus Reward Points on card activation
welcomeBenefits.condition: On payment of joining fee and first transaction

milestoneBenefits.benefit: Annual fee waiver + 10,000 bonus Reward Points

additionalBenefits: 8 international lounge visits per year via Priority Pass
10X rewards on AU travel portal bookings
Complimentary golf sessions and concierge services
pros: Unlimited domestic lounge access for frequent flyers
Excellent 10X rewards on travel portal (5% effective return)
Strong 5X rewards on international spends (2.5% return)
Higher point value of ₹0.50 compared to lower-tier AU cards
Comprehensive travel and air accident insurance
cons: ₹8L annual spend required for fee waiver is steep
AU Bank's travel portal may have limited inventory
Limited brand recognition compared to HDFC/Amex super-premium cards
idealFor: High spenders who can hit the ₹8L waiver threshold
Users seeking premium travel benefits from a smaller bank at lower fees

faqs.question: What does unlimited domestic lounge access mean?
faqs.answer: You can access domestic airport lounges as many times as you want throughout the year without any cap. This applies at all Dreamfolks and Visa-partnered lounges across Indian airports.

faqs.question: How does the 10X travel portal reward work?
faqs.answer: Bookings made through AU Bank's dedicated travel portal earn 30 RP per ₹100 (10X the base rate of 3 RP). At ₹0.50 per point, this gives you an effective 15% return, capped at 15,000 bonus RP per month.

faqs.question: Is the 2% forex markup competitive?
faqs.answer: Yes, 2% is very competitive for the Indian market. Most premium cards charge 2.5-3.5%. Only the Amex Platinum Charge (0%) and a few other super-premium cards offer lower rates.

faqs.question: How does the ₹1 Crore air accident insurance work?
faqs.answer: If you book your flight ticket using the AU Zenith+ card, you are covered for up to ₹1 Crore in case of accidental death or permanent disability during air travel. Terms and conditions apply as per the insurance policy.
